% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% HOEFFDING / EW BOUND MODEL
% k = log(2r/delta) / (2*epsilon^2), p = min(1, k/r)
% Zero fitted parameters: epsilon and delta are user-chosen conventions.
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

% Default parameters
\newcommand{\hoeffdingEpsilon}{0.1}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingDelta}{0.1}
\newcommand{\targetRho}{0.95}

% Hoeffding required k at common reaches (epsilon=0.1, delta=0.1)
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKFiveK}{576}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKTenK}{610}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKTwentyK}{645}

% Hoeffding sampling probability at common reaches
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPOneK}{49.5}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTwoK}{26.5}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPFiveK}{11.5}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTenK}{6.1}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTwentyK}{3.2}

% Hoeffding speedup at common reaches
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupFiveK}{8.7}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupTenK}{16.4}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupTwentyK}{31.0}
